title: Desktop and GUI Management

key_components.name: UIGroupsManager
key_components.notes: Experimental feature; shown only when window.experimental_features is true. Opened via context-menu 'user-options-menu' event.

key_components.name: Service
key_components.notes: Base for all GUI services; bridges to putility concepts.Service. Stores services reference from init call.

key_components.name: SettingsService
key_components.notes: Extensible tab registry; external code can register additional UIElement tabs via register_tab().

use_cases.name: Open Desktop
use_cases.description: On authenticated load, initgui calls UIDesktop({ desktop_fsentry }) after stat-ing the desktop path. Desktop is skipped in popup/dashboard mode.
use_cases.triggers: User login success or existing session detection

use_cases.name: Apply Theme
use_cases.description: User changes personalization settings. ThemeService.apply(values) merges new values into state, calls reload_() to update CSS variables on :root, then save_() to debounce-persist to ~/.__puter_gui.json via puter.fs.write.

use_cases.name: Load Persisted Theme on Init
use_cases.description: ThemeService._init() reads ~/.__puter_gui.json via puter.fs.read(). If data.colors exists, merges into state and calls reload_().

use_cases.name: Reset Theme to Defaults
use_cases.description: ThemeService.reset() sets state to default_values, calls reload_(), then deletes ~/.__puter_gui.json.

use_cases.name: Broadcast Theme Change to Apps
use_cases.description: After reload_(), BroadcastService.sendBroadcast('themeChanged', palette, { sendToNewAppInstances: true }) notifies all running app iframes of the new color palette.

use_cases.name: Open Settings Panel
use_cases.description: User opens Settings UI. SettingsService.get_tabs() returns registered tab list (Usage, Account, Security, Personalization, Language, Keyboard Shortcuts, About). UI renders tabs.

use_cases.name: Register Custom Settings Tab
use_cases.description: Extensions call SettingsService.register_tab(tab) to add their UIElement as a settings panel. If tab is a UIElement, its TSettingsTab trait metadata is extracted.

use_cases.name: Open Groups Manager
use_cases.description: When experimental_features is enabled, user opens user-options context menu. ctxmenu-will-open event injects 'Groups Manager' item. On click, UIGroupsManager is instantiated and open_as_window() is called.

use_cases.name: Refresh Desktop Background
use_cases.description: window.refresh_desktop_background() is called on login and on session restore when not in fullpage/popup mode.

use_cases.name: Resize Desktop
use_cases.description: On window resize event, desktop_height/width are recalculated and login/signup windows are re-centered.

key_relationships: initgui registers ThemeService as 'theme', SettingsService as 'settings'
important_notes: UIGroupsManager is behind window.experimental_features flag. ThemeService uses a 1s debounce before persisting. SettingsService tab registry is extensible at runtime. Desktop is not loaded in popup (embedded_in_popup) or dashboard (is_dashboard_mode) modes.
